hero.title: Milan Nepal Westend Saptarangi
hero.tagline: Aromatic, deeply flavored Himalayan cuisine — fresh ingredients, heady spices, vibrant colors

about.p1_1: Nestled in the heart of Westend, Espoo,
about.p1_2: brings the authentic flavors of Nepal and the greater Himalayan region to Finland. Our name,
about.p1_3: , means "seven colors" — a celebration of the vibrant, multi-hued tapestry of Himalayan cuisine.
about.p2: Every dish begins with the freshest ingredients — hand-ground spice blends, aromatic herbs, and time-honored recipes passed down through generations. From our tandoor-grilled meats to our slow-simmered curries, each plate is a journey through the aromatic kitchens of Kathmandu, Pokhara, and beyond.
about.p3: We believe in family hospitality. When you dine with us, you're not just a guest — you're family. Our warm, welcoming atmosphere and attentive service are as much a part of the experience as the food itself.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Discover
menu.description: From aromatic starters to hearty mains, each dish is crafted with authentic Himalayan spices and the freshest ingredients.

order.description: Can't make it to the restaurant? Order your favorite Himalayan dishes for delivery through Wolt, or call us for takeaway.
order.info: Delivery available through Wolt · Takeaway by phone: +358 44 777 3636

footer.description: Authentic Himalayan cuisine crafted with love, fresh ingredients, and generations of tradition.
